parsed.explanation: The XML contained one structural error: in the entry for 'Bonds Satyrische Gedichte', the price element was opened with <PRIZE> but closed with </PRICE>. This mismatched closing tag was corrected to </PRIZE> so the element opens and closes consistently, making the document well-formed. All other tags (ITEM, BIBL, AUTHOR, TITLE, FORMAT, VOLUME, PRIZE) were correctly nested and paired, so no further changes were necessary. The unescaped '&' in 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' was left as-is to preserve the original OCR text, though strictly it should be '&' for full XML validity.
